results.rendered_html:
samī—√bhū P. -bhavati, to be or become equal, be equalized,  MW. ;
to place one's self on an equality,  Āpast. ;
to be razed to the ground or destroyed,  Jātakam.

results.rendered_html: samībhū (2. sama + 1. bhū) sich gleich stellen: vāci pathi śayyāyāmāsana iti ˚bhavato (sc. śūdrasya) daṇḍatāḍanam  ĀPAST. 2,27,15 . ˚bhūta in eine gleiche Lage gebracht: daṃpatyoḥ pārśvasaṃsthayoḥ ˚śarīrayoḥ  Spr. (II) 119 . gleich gemacht (an Gewicht): pratimāna˚  YĀJÑ. 2,100 . gleichgiltig geworden: dṛṣṭi  Spr. (II) 5202 .
